message:
✨ Add kubeflex version switching (v0.8.0, v0.7.0)

- Add kubeflex 0.8.0 and 0.7.0 to version selector
- Add Netlify build contexts for kubeflex version branches
- Version branches already created: docs/kubeflex/0.8.0, docs/kubeflex/0.7.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,6 +61,13 @@
 [context."docs/0.21.0"]
   command = "npm run build"
 
+# Kubeflex version branches
+[context."docs/kubeflex/0.8.0"]
+  command = "npm run build"
+
+[context."docs/kubeflex/0.7.0"]
+  command = "npm run build"
+
 # Forms configuration
 [forms]
   # Enable spam filtering
